notes: Default local-gpu profile for this repo.
If gemma3:4b still runs out of memory or is too slow, gemma3:1b is an unofficial smoke-test-only fallback rather than a supported tier profile.
Keep game-embedding on the hosted text-embedding-3-small route for this tier.
Official Ollama artifact size for gemma3:4b is about 3.3 GB; usable VRAM headroom must be higher than the model artifact size.
Use this tier only when detected VRAM is comfortably above the 8 GB tier.
Fall back to local-gpu-8gb if startup reliability is poor or the 12B model feels too slow.
Keep game-embedding on the hosted text-embedding-3-small route for this tier.
Official Ollama artifact size for gemma3:12b is about 8.1 GB; artifact size is not the same as safe minimum VRAM.
Use local embeddings only on this tier, and switch game-embedding back to the hosted default if local embedding throughput is poor.
Fall back to local-gpu-12gb if gemma3:27b startup is unreliable or if the local embedding path is unavailable.
Official Ollama artifact sizes are about 17 GB for gemma3:27b and about 622 MB for embeddinggemma.
VRAM remains the authoritative selector even when a GPU SKU is listed as an example.
